form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Latest effort finished 5th over 530m at this track beaten 15 lengths (31.55) behind Compton Gypsy in a Grade 5 on April 9. Consistent record from this draw. Solid chance.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.75 lengths second over 530m Murray Bridge in 30.25. Scored five on the trot prior to last start. Can return to winning form.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 32 length fourth over 730m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 6 on April 16 over 530m at this track behind Quick Strike, beaten 8 lengths (31.26). Likely to struggle this time.
